SEARCH
Package org.patternfly.component.chip

Class Chip

java.lang.Object
org.patternfly.component.BaseComponent<HTMLElement,Chip>
org.patternfly.component.chip.Chip
All Implemented Interfaces:
Attachable, Container<HTMLElement,Chip>, Finder<HTMLElement>, HasElement<HTMLElement,Chip>, HasHTMLElement<HTMLElement,Chip>, IsElement<HTMLElement>, TypedBuilder<HTMLElement,Chip>, Component, ComponentReference<ChipGroup>, Closeable<HTMLElement,Chip>, HasValue<String>
public class Chip extends BaseComponent<HTMLElement,Chip> implements ComponentReference<ChipGroup>, Closeable<HTMLElement,Chip>, HasValue<String>, Attachable
A chip is used to communicate a value or a set of attribute-value pairs within workflows that involve filtering a set of objects.
See Also:
  • https://www.patternfly.org/components/chip/html
